purpose: Full Research/ repository file catalog with integrity. INTEGRITY_MANIFEST derived from this + GOVERNANCE_CORE.current_surfaces at validation time.
note: Full catalog for tooling. GOVERNANCE_CORE defines 'current' surfaces; this provides integrity for all tracked files.
generation_rule: regenerate on release or when file tree changes materially

_validation.derived_integrity: sha256 of GOVERNANCE_CORE.current_surfaces files, computed at validation time
